STI Training 
Apr. 24, 2024 
At a glance 
These resources share clinical guidance and information about sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and diseases (STDs). 
CDC provides STI clinical management courses, behavioral intervention training, and courses for STI program staff. 
Explore STI resources, trainings, courses, and online seminars for clinicians, public health practitioners, and other health professionals. 
About these resources 
CDC provides sexually transmitted infection (STI) resources and guidance for public health practitioners, physicians, clinicians, and other health professionals. Resources include:
Clinical management courses 
Behavioral intervention training 
STI program staff courses 
The STI clinical slides depict symptoms of sexually transmitted infections. The slides are for use by health
